context.usage: Randomly spawned on floor; removed by swipe-to-clean.

acceptance_criteria: Sprite is exactly 2x2px and uses #AB5236 for all 4 pixels.
Remains visible on floor colors (#FFA300, #FFF1E8) by being a solid 2x2 block.
Background is fully transparent outside the 2x2 bounds.

reference_images.label: poop_object_doc
reference_images.purpose: Poop footprint, cleanup target size, and floor readability anchor.

reference_images.label: care_system_doc
reference_images.purpose: Feed, clean, and pet interaction timing plus UI icon anchor.

reference_images.label: cage_object_doc
reference_images.purpose: Cage layout, perch, bowl placement, and floor bounds anchor.

bevy_constraints.bundle_strategy: SpriteBundle for obstacles asset loading with nearest-neighbor sampling and deterministic z-order.
bevy_constraints.asset_loading: Load obstacles/poop_item_2x2.png through AssetServer and store the handle under poop_item_2x2.
runtime_notes: Spawn care props and particles as separate entities so feed, clean, and pet logic can toggle visibility without atlas mutation.
Register manifest execution_order in a startup resource so build order stays deterministic during content validation.
Read frame size and bounds from specs.dimensions_px rather than texture metadata during runtime checks.
